# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
GameVault delivers free online games you can play anywhere, anytime. No restrictions, no downloads—just pure gaming entertainment at your fingertips.

### Games
https://example.com/games
Explore hundreds of unblocked games across every genre. From action to puzzles, find your next favorite game in our constantly updated collection.

### About
https://example.com/about
Discover how GameVault became the go-to unblocked games website for gamers seeking unrestricted access to quality entertainment without barriers.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about our free online games or need support? Reach out to the GameVault team and we&#39;ll respond quickly to help enhance your experience.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
